rulings.Case Title: HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 10, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT KEYHAN MOHANNA's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DENIED. Moving party fails to sustain its burden under CCP 473(b) and CCP 1008 regarding January 12, 2017 judgment. To the extent the motion purports to address October 13, 2015 entry of default and/or December 2016 order denying defendant's motion to vacate default, the motion is untimely and not properly noticed (See Notice of Motion and Amended Notice of Motion). Additionally, the Court notes that the moving party submitted (1) a total of 46 pages of Memorandum of Points and Authorities including an untimely February 21, 2017 filing made without leave of Court and (2) several unauthorized untimely requests for judicial notice. = (501/AC)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. YICK ON WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion: (1) To Compel Responses To Written Discovery; (2) To Compel Production Of Documents; (3) For An Order Establishing Admissions; And (3) Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 10, 2017, line 4. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion: (1) To Compel Responses To Written Discovery; (2) To Compel Production Of Documents; (3) For An Order Establishing Admissions; And (3) Request For Sanctions GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendant to provide complete verified responses without objections to From Interrogatories and Requests for Production within 15 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $944. = (501/AC)
